text:
Expressing quantities in terms of powers of 10
0 was explicitly used in
the
e Rigveda, thus setting
the stage
for the number
system based
don
powers of 10 to be developed in India in the ensuing years, and which
use around the
 World today. The development of the Indian
wenow
system in terms of place values and
numeral
powers of 10 also helped
pave the
way
for what is
6 perhaps
the most important mathematical
t
invention in human history: the
e concept of zero.
